ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "us_mens" REAL /* US men's shoe size */,
  "jp_cm" INTEGER /* Japanese shoe size in centimeters */,
  "cn" INTEGER /* Chinese shoe size */,
  "ko_mm" INTEGER /* Korean shoe size in millimeters */,
  "uk_india" REAL /* UK/Indian shoe size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (men's/women's) */,
  "half_size" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is a half size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the size entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the size entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "preferred_size_standard" TEXT /* Preferred shoe size standard of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "preferred_measurement_system" TEXT /* Preferred measurement system of the customer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the customer's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion history entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who performed the conversion */,
  "original_size" TEXT /* Original shoe size entered by the customer */,
  "original_size_standard" TEXT /* Standard of the original size */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted shoe size in the customer's preferred standard */,
  "converted_size_standard" TEXT /* Standard of the converted size */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Customer's rating of the conversion accuracy */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for returning the product due to size issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for whom the recommendation was made */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended shoe size for the customer */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size variant */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size for which this is a variant */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Description of the size variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)
